items.title: Brazil sets compensation rules for wind and solar curtailment
items.summary:
Brazil has introduced a compensation framework for wind and solar generators affected by curtailment, covering eligible grid-related and reliability-driven cuts from 2023 to 2025. The rules aim to reduce legal uncertainty, while excluding energy oversupply-related curtailment and highlighting the need for long-term grid expansion and storage solutions.
The post Brazil sets compensation rules for wind and solar curtailment appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 巴西制定风能和太阳能减排补偿规则

items.title: Argentina’s distributed solar capacity grew 34.5% in H1
items.summary:
The capacity of self-consumption systems connected to distribution grids increased from 118.6 MW at the end of 2025 to 159.5 MW in June, while the number of users generating and feeding surplus electricity into the grid rose 25.8% to more than 4,700.
The post Argentina’s distributed solar capacity grew 34.5% in H1 appeared first on pv magazine Global.

items.title: New rules for Poland’s grid
items.summary:
Poland’s amended Energy Act – sometimes known as the Grid Act – came into force on April 30, 2026, introducing significant changes for grid connections to generation and storage. Poland’s Ministry of Energy estimates that the new regulations could unlock the potential to connect around 150 GW of new renewables and storage capacity. New possibilities for cable pooling have been welcomed, but asset owners also face a greater financial commitment when connections are issued and implemented. Energy law expert Piotr Mrowiec outlines the new rules and provisions.
The post New rules for Poland’s grid appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 波兰电网新规则

items.title: Anker SOLIX Summer Camp power station sale with exclusive savings from $189, HiEHA CarPlay SU8 2.0 e-bike low, EcoFlow, more
items.summary:
At the front of our midweek Green Deal’s pack is the current Anker SOLIX Summer Camp Outlet Sale with up to $1,496 savings on power stations + exclusive bonus savings – all starting from $189. Right behind it is HiEHA’s CarPlay-equipped SU8 2.0 Smart Moped-Style e-bike down at a $750 low, alongside a dual-battery bundle option and the bike’s first-generation predecessor. From there, we have EcoFlow’s 5-Day Member Flash Sale with six different offers (including an EcoCredits promotion) starting from $1, the Segway Navimow i105N and i110N Robot Lawn Mowers starting from $669, and much more. As always, you can find all the hangover deals from this week down at the bottom of the page, like yesterday’s launch deal on the new roborock RockMow X120H LiDAR AWD Robot Lawn Mower, the soon-to-end Bluetti July Member Day power station sale lineup, and more. 
Head below for other New Green Deals we’ve found today and, of course, Electrek’s best EV buying and leasing deals. Also, check out the new Electrek Tesla Shop for the best deals on Tesla accessories.

items.title: This country went 100% electric vehicles overnight with a drastic approach
items.summary:
Laos did something no other country has tried: it banned the import of new gas and diesel passenger cars outright. As of June 1, nearly every new car cleared for import has to be electric.
It’s the most aggressive EV mandate on the planet right now, and it has almost nothing to do with consumer demand.

items.summary: OpenAI announces Project Camellia in Effingham County, Georgia, with commitments to responsible energy, community investment, jobs, and access to Codex.
items.translatedTitle: 与埃芬汉县社区一起建设人工智能基础设施

items.title: Greece to permit balcony solar, storage
items.summary:
Greece has run a public consultation on reforms to rules governing installations for self-consumption that would permit balcony solar up to 800 W.
The post Greece to permit balcony solar, storage appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 希腊允许阳台太阳能、储能

items.title: To sell solar, sell the family, support the champion, and mind the timing
items.summary:
Research suggests that a strong predictor of a household going solar is engagement among the family. Solar salespeople should identify and support the "solar champion" as the family works through the details of understanding the new product, found the study.
The post To sell solar, sell the family, support the champion, and mind the timing appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 出售太阳能，出售家庭，支持冠军，并把握时机

items.title: Advancing the next era of national science
items.summary: OpenAI outlines its commitment to advancing American science working with the U.S. Department of Energy and national labs to use frontier AI to accelerate discovery.
items.translatedTitle: 推进国家科学新时代

items.title: Dutch student team develops solar-powered ambulance
items.summary:
A student team at the Eindhoven University of Technology has developed what it says is the world's first solar-powered ambulance, designed to deliver healthcare services to remote communities. The vehicle combines a 50 kWh battery with 542 solar cells, offering a claimed range of up to 715 km on paved roads while powering onboard medical equipment.
The post Dutch student team develops solar-powered ambulance appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 荷兰学生团队研发太阳能救护车

items.title: 1.5GWh+ of BESS deals in Italy: Sonnedix, Strioga buy projects; BNZ, RWE order from Sungrow and LONGi
items.summary: Activity in Italy's grid-scale market is accelerating, with Sonnedix and the Strioga Family Foundation acquiring projects totalling over 1GWh combined, while BNZ and RWE have ordered BESS from Sungrow and LONGi respectively totalling 540MWh.
items.translatedTitle: BESS在意大利的1.5GWh+交易： Sonnedix、Strioga购买项目； BNZ、RWE从Sungrow和LONGi订购

items.title: Fire breaks out at 1.5 MW battery storage system in Germany
items.summary:
A lithium battery storage system housed in four containers caught fire this week in eastern Germany, prompting evacuations as firefighters continue cooling the facility. 
The post Fire breaks out at 1.5 MW battery storage system in Germany appeared first on pv magazine Global.
items.translatedTitle: 德国1.5兆瓦电池存储系统发生火灾

items.title: Iberdrola reports US$4.9 billion H1 2026 net profit as solar capacity increases, but renewable generation falls
